query: SELECT id, name, email FROM users; SELECT id, userId, name FROM technicians; SELECT id, clientId, technicianId, status FROM serviceRequests; SELECT id, requestId, senderId, senderName, LEFT(content,30) as content, isRead FROM chatMessages ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
